caption: In a formal setting featuring a textured green wall and carved wooden pillars, a man with a white beard, wearing a cream-colored traditional Indian outfit, stands at a podium delivering a speech. He is gesturing with his hands as he speaks. To his right, two other men are seated; one is dressed in a light-colored shirt and a grey vest, while the other is partially visible behind him. The speaker remains at the podium throughout the sequence, though his arm movements shift slightly as he emphasizes points in his address. A microphone is positioned on the podium in front of him. The overall environment is stationary, with the only movement being the speaker's gestures and the subtle shifts in posture of the seated individuals. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
